name: wasm-image-processor
description: High-performance image processing using Rust and WebAssembly

scripts.build:wasm: cargo build --target wasm32-unknown-unknown --release && wasm-bindgen --target web --out-dir pkg target/wasm32-unknown-unknown/release/wasm_image_processor.wasm
scripts.test:all: npm run test:rust && npm run test:run
scripts.test:all:ci: npm run test:rust && npm run test:rust:wasm && npm run test:run

author: Joan Leon
